name: evose-chart-motion
description: Evose animated chart components for Remotion

scripts.render: remotion render src/index.tsx ChartDemo out/chart-demo.mp4 --codec h264 --width 1080 --height 1920 --fps 30
scripts.render:bar: remotion render src/index.tsx BarChartDemo out/bar-demo.mp4 --codec h264 --width 1080 --height 1920 --fps 30
